description: Fix dynamic bonus allocation and add revision completion info in question items
steps: Fix getBonusItems to track time spent based on stored timeEstimate in history entries rather than current mutated type
Store timeEstimate in history entries when feedback is given
Make bonus section re-render dynamically after each bonus item feedback
Add revision completion info (Rev N done on [date]) in renderQuestionItem
Add CSS styling for revision info text
acceptance_criteria: When all scheduled items are done, bonus section shows and refreshes after each bonus feedback
Time tracking uses stored timeEstimate from history, not current item type
Bonus items still follow spaced repetition logic (overdue > struggled > category order)
Bonus items only pull from deferred/today items and items due tomorrow
Feedback on bonus items goes through SpacedRepetitionEngine.scheduleRevision()
Question bank shows revision status (Rev N done on [date]) for completed questions
verification: Verify JS syntax with node --check app.js
Verify bonus re-render logic in code
Verify history entries include timeEstimate field
